signature.tab.label: Signature
signature.tab.subject: Subject
signature.tab.noWritePermission: You do not have permission to sign this document.
signature.tab.noCertificate: You need to generate a certificate before signing documents. Go to your user menu and select Certificates.
signature.tab.signingReasonPlaceholder: Enter a reason for signing this document
signature.tab.unsignable: This document cannot be signed. Please attach a file first.
signature.tab.rootCertificateInfo: Download the public root certificate to install in your PDF viewer for verifying signed documents.
signature.tab.downloadRootCert: Download the public root certificate for your PDF viewer
signature.cert.title: My Certificate
signature.cert.existing: Your digital certificate is ready for signing documents.
signature.cert.noCertificate: You don't have a certificate yet. Generate one to start signing documents.
signature.cert.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters and different from your login. Make sure you remember it — there is no reset mechanism.
signature.cert.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your certificate? You will need to generate a new one to sign documents.
signature.cert.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
